# Skills

*Generated by an AI skill reading the live OpenClaw configs from Octo.* 🐙

## 🔧 config-backup

Backup OpenClaw config and agent workspace (memory, SOUL.md, TOOLS.md, etc.) to Git with automatic change detection. Commits and pushes only when files have changed.

---

## 🏡 homeassistant-cli

Advanced Home Assistant control using the official hass-cli tool. Features auto-completion, event monitoring, history queries, and rich output formatting. Alternative to the curl-based homeassistant skill - choose this if you want a more interactive CLI experience with better discovery and formatting.

## 🔧 outlook-work-calendar

Fetch Jeff Steinbok's Outlook work calendar from the published endpoint. Use when the user asks about calendar events, availability, meetings, or schedules for work. Returns events with subject, start/end times, location, busy status, and sensitivity level.

---

## 🔧 weightwatchers

Track Weight Watchers (WW) points, search foods, log meals, and retrieve daily food diaries. Supports SmartPoints calculation from nutrition data and photo-based food logging via the unofficial WW API.

---
